description_long: This object consists of a set of four swords, each with a distinct blade length and design, arranged horizontally. The blades are metallic and dark, with a sleek, sharp appearance, and each sword features a golden or brass-colored guard and pommel. The handles are wrapped in a textured, orange-brown material, providing both grip and visual contrast. The largest sword has a broad, straight blade with a pronounced guard, while the smallest is slender and rapier-like, with a knuckle guard. The overall aesthetic is ornate yet functional, suggesting ceremonial or high-status use. Subtle decorative accents, such as colored bands and geometric shapes, are visible on the handles and guards.
description: A set of four ornate swords with dark blades, golden guards, and textured orange-brown handles, each varying in size and design.
description_view_0: A narrow, end-on view showing the swords aligned vertically, revealing the thickness and decorative handle details.
description_view_1: A side view displaying the full profiles of all four swords, highlighting blade shapes, guards, and handle designs.
description_view_2: The opposite end-on view, again showing the swords' thickness and the alignment of decorative handle elements.
description_view_3: A mirrored side view of the swords, emphasizing the opposite profiles and the intricate guard and handle features.
attribute_blade_type: straight, single-edged and double-edged, broad and slender, non-serrated
attribute_handle_design: wrapped, straight, orange-brown textured grip, some with knuckle guard, decorative bands
attribute_ornamentation: colored bands, geometric shapes, subtle decorative accents
